title: codereview pass 3: new configs in main Kconfig should depend on LICHEN
description: The added LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED and LICHEN_DEFAULT_SF in lichen/subsys/lichen/Kconfig lack 'depends on LICHEN'. Should add it to scope them under the menuconfig. Also update help texts to be consistent with existing ones and reference spec. P2. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Fixed by consolidating Kconfig definitions into lichen/subsys/lichen/Kconfig, removing duplicates from link/ and routing/, adding depends on LICHEN, and updating help text for consistency with spec and zrh2.2. Duplicates eliminated, dependencies corrected.
